summary: Bug fix verification for cart instanceId issue - VERIFIED WORKING. The fix correctly separates same items added multiple times with different extras. Each cart item now has a unique instanceId, extras are properly linked to specific instances only, removal removes only the specific instance, and per-item notes are independent.
passed_tests: Cart displays separate entries for same item added multiple times - PASSED (3 burgers shown as 3 separate entries)
Each cart item instance shows only its own linked extras - PASSED (Burger 1: extra meat, Burger 2: cheddar, Burger 3: none)
Extras added via modal are correctly linked to the specific item instance - PASSED (instanceId correctly passed to ExtrasModal)
Item quantity buttons work correctly for each instance - PASSED (qty +/- works per instance)
Remove button removes only the specific instance - PASSED (middle item removal only removed that item)
Total price calculation includes all items and extras correctly - PASSED (101.00 RON = 43+43+15)
Per-item notes work independently for each instance - PASSED (different notes for each burger)
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: eslint warning in MenuSection.js line 45 - useMemo has unnecessary 'language' dependency
context_for_next_testing_agent: The cart instanceId bug fix has been fully verified. Key verification points: 1) Same item added multiple times creates separate cart entries with unique instanceIds like 'inst_1_timestamp', 2) ExtrasModal receives instanceId prop and links extras to that specific instance, 3) CheckoutPage uses instanceId for all operations (keys, removal, notes, quantity). All features working correctly.
rca_of_the_issue: Original bug: extras were linked using item.id (menu item ID) instead of instanceId. This caused all instances of the same menu item to share the same extras. Fix: ExtrasModal.js now accepts instanceId prop and passes it to addExtra, MenuSection.js passes instanceId to modal after calling addItem, and CheckoutPage.js uses instanceId for rendering and all operations.
